title: Ecbolium flexuosum
taxonomy: Ecbolium flexuosum is classified within the plant family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, to the phylum Magnoliophyta. Further classification places Ecbolium flexuosum within the class Magnoliopsida. The order Lamiales and family Acanthaceae are also key classifications for this plant. This classification provides a general overview of the plant's evolutionary relationships and taxonomic position.
